Our Academic and Administrative Staff Gathered for the Eid Celebration

27.03.2025

During the Eid celebration gathering attended by our academic and administrative staff, the importance of unity and solidarity was emphasized, and our Rector shared the university’s goals for the upcoming period.

Our traditional Eid celebration, bringing together our academic and administrative staff, was held on Wednesday, March 26, at 12:00 PM in the Media and Event Center’s Event Hall.

The opening speech was delivered by our Secretary General, Sebahattin Belik, who highlighted the significance of unity and solidarity during Eid. He also extended his gratitude to the academic and administrative staff for their contributions to the university and conveyed his best wishes.

Following this, our President, Prof. Atilla Arkan, was invited to the podium to deliver his address. In his speech, he outlined the university’s strategic goals for the upcoming term, emphasizing a stronger focus on internationalization, artificial intelligence, and research collaborations with graduate students, particularly in the areas of academic publishing and societal impact. He concluded by extending his Eid greetings to all participants.

The ceremony concluded with the exchange of Eid greetings among academic and administrative staff, followed by the presentation of gifts.
